programme.title: Hydroplane Racing

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Lawmen
programme.desc: While celebrating in an inebriated state a group of cattlemen inadvertently kill an old man in Bannock The righteous marshal of the town vows to punish them

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who dont know their land holds lots of gold Gene puts a stop to it

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: The N team gets warp into the world of Faxanadu after a power overload in the Palace of Powers football arena There they get mixed in the conflict between elves and dwarves and also an evil being bent on getting a powerful crystal that will let him conquer the video world

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain go to an Old Wild West amusement park to stop a MAD plot to make the park their new headquarters

programme.title: Grape Ape
programme.desc: Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Hong 109
programme.desc: Hong 109

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In Los Angeles aspiring screenwriter Edward Foster from Indiana has a crush on his neighbor Miranda Singer However bimbo Miranda is a gold digger who does not give Edward any attention His unrequited love is noticed by his creepy landlord Mr Stronham who offers Edward a love potion in order to seduce Miranda Will the potion work

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A sadistic serial killer has unforeseen complications when pursued by a determined motorcycle cop in a barren desert

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Self-centered yuppie lawyer Ted Miller reunites with Melody a former flame who clings to her 60s hippie ideals He lets her stay at his apartment but she sees that he sold out his youthful beliefs in favor of greed and materialism

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Desperate transgender woman Nina Russell hires prominent sleazy arrogant plastic surgeon Dr Christopher Hamilton to create an attractive face for her He operates on her after a night of drugging when he is unfit to hold a scalpel

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Jannette asks Nick for help in investigating the murder of a friend which leads Nick into the bizarre world of prostitution

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki is captured by a deranged scientist who uses an antique silver syringe to extract brain fluids from prostitutes

programme.title: Jaws of Satan
programme.desc: A preacher whose ancestors were cursed by Druids battles Satan who has taken the form of a huge snake

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Greg will lie about anything to get a date with a hot girl but when she ends up being everything he has already lied about he must die Then her roommate wants to get ahead at work so is introduced her to a beauty czar who makes her exquisitely lovely which spells her downfall

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Amos sneaks into an air base to complain about jet noise over the farm and accidentally touches classified material so when Luke and Kate come looking for Grandpa they are all suspected of espionage

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are upset when Luke sells food on credit to a failing restaurant run by a widow and her daughter but the McCoy patriarch softens his no credit stance considerably when he learns that the proprietress is attractive and spunky

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After Max hides some secret plans he has to go into a jail to retrieve them

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The deadliest of the species A woman pretends to love Max so she can kill him

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger brings home an inventor-friends homemade lie detector and he hooks it up to Wilbur who later hooks it up to Ed

programme.title: Hogans 309
programme.desc: Hogans 309

programme.title: Hogans 329
programme.desc: Hogans 329

programme.title: Mchale 415
programme.desc: Mchale 415

programme.title: Mchale 314
programme.desc: Mchale 314

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer accompanies his friend Frankie to his home for the weekend While there Gomer sings a love song to Frankies sister who is engaged to a local fellow who is not in a rush to get married Frankie and his mother use this as an opportunity to move the fellow to the altar

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Pyle wants Sgt Carter to meet his cousin Bridey at the Camp Dance Carter declines until he and Cpl Boyle spot Pyle out with a very attractive girl They assume erroneously that the girl is Pyles cousin After that is explained there is another case of mistaken identity that keep Carter and Boyle busy

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: In Seine

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw has invented a spray that rots wood instantly If he is not paid one million dollars he will destroy every forest in the world Inspector gadget destroys the invention

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.desc: Love Boat 113

programme.desc: WKRP 109

programme.title: WKRP 113
programme.desc: WKRP 113

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor accepts a summer job in Texas which doesnt make Daisy happy; Wood may have found a new quarterback; Herman books John Denver to give the commencement speech

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood and Ava are nervous as Molly shows interest in boys

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Vega

programme.title: Hercules 110
programme.desc: Hercules 110

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam and Renee investigate a dead pregnant woman missing her fetus They discover a town that Daan helped after a nuclear meltdown and a suspicious brother and sister who were part of an early experiment to combine human and Taelon DNA

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane experiments with artificial earthquakes

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressa is taken hostage by a man with a score to settle with Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A transmission from Dr Logan in Texas City leads the Alphans to believe that they can finally land back on Earth through a revolutionary teleportation process The downside is that it is now 2120 on Earth and the surface has become an unbreathable wasteland through centuries of pollution The Alphans though are intent on abandoning the wandering moon However due to a hitch the Alphan test subjects find themselves in a primitive and hostile environment It is Scotland in the fourteenth century where the Scots are at war with the English invaders who kidnap the Alphan trio

programme.title: Meteor
programme.desc: When USA detects a gigantic meteor moving towards Earth their only hope to save mankind is to use an illegal nuclear weapon satellite However they soon realize that they cannot do it alone

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are arrested when they mistakenly pick up a crate containing a marijuana shipment Private detective Mason Dixon and his two beautiful female associates are convinced the Duke boys are innocent and they work together to bring down a drug-smuggling operation

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone and Keller have less than 48 hours to prevent a politically motivated assassination by a mentally unstable but very accurate marksman

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A prince the absolute ruler of a principality has 15 million which he plans to use for arms to wage war on a neighboring oil-rich country Briggs devises a scheme that involves breaking the bank of the princes casino First the IMF will utilize a computer to take 200000 at roulette That will provide the stake the IMF needs to take the prince at a high-stakes game of baccarat

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gannon and Friday visit a self-described guru who advocates mind-expansion through drugs Brother William is suspected of giving or selling LSD to minors The detectives debate their ideas of drug use with the suspect

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are asked by a woman from Oregon to try to find her niece who has run away from home Their search eventually leads them into the world of pornography and they soon become involved in the arrest of a pornographer who may have info on where she might be located

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a delivery driver Kimble rescues a man and a woman from the wreckage of a small airplane All three have a problem the man is a politician the woman is not his wife and Kimble doesnt want publicity as the rescuer

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: A man arrives at the ranch looking for Heath and is shot by two trailing bounty hunters who claim he is wanted for murder While the man is recuperating at the ranch Jarrod travels to Coreyville to look into the murder charge and Heath comes to terms with an old grudge

programme.desc: Chey 409

programme.title: American Guerrilla In The Philippines
programme.desc: American soldiers stranded in the Philippines after the Japanese invasion form guerrilla bands to fight back

programme.title: Highlander II The Quickening
programme.desc: In this sci-fifantasy sequel Connor MacLeod Christopher Lambert has become an elderly man after losing his immortality Living in a bleak future where the world is protected from solar radiation by a massive shield MacLeod regains his youth when he kills two assassins from his home planet This results in an ongoing battle with the villainous and powerful Gen Katana Michael Ironside but MacLeod receives help when the noble Juan Ramirez Sean Connery returns

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Killdozer
programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Avenging Force
programme.desc: A senator is targeted by the Pentangle a right wing paramilitary group His pal a former CIA agent and martial artist tries to help him The group kidnaps the agents sister and tries to hunt him down The Most Dangerous Game style

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 43 kicks off with amateur fights between 6'8'' Will Woo vs. Murray Hunter followed by powerhouses Riley Pequin vs. Levi Armstrong. And finally, pro fighter Jason Zentrgraf takes on UFC Veteran Nick ""The Promise"" Ring.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Abdallah Ibrahim v. Kevin Walker

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 43 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating matchup of Keegan ""The Condition"" Oliver vs. pro debut Derek ""Manchild"" Falk. This is followed by the entertaining contest of Aaron ""Vanilla Gorilla"" Gallant vs. Mike O'Neil, and the first Welterweight Title Defense for Sergej ""El Dorado"" Juskevic as he takes on challenger Lorawnt-T Nelson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Connor Hayes v. Arydas Pumputis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.desc: From different worlds and 2 different culturals Meet the rap star and the opera star who got together an made a few hits

programme.desc: Meet this young lady who writes and performs with a real chip on her shoulder Jaxx Kellerman on the Sherard Show

programme.desc: Hear the riveting story of a preacher whose promiscuous life almost destroyed him

programme.desc: Meet the man in 1992 who helped to end the Rodney King riots

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss has developed a new vine a madness vine which drives men crazy and he is luring the greatest Armada of the Tengu to fight him Jayce tries to warn Prince Akeer not to fight but they are insulted by the thought of defeat or not accepting

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce follows a clue to Audric and meets up with the gambler Vendetta who has a tape regarding his father but Jayce has to win it in a game It is a trap laid by Saw Boss Vendetta plays a game with Herc to settle an old debt of Hercs

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: During Glorias first Indy 500 race all electronic devices suddenly come to a stop thanks to a powerful EMP device VENOM is projecting from a blimp Their next target the International Safe Corporation

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: The Golden Antlers of Artemis said to be able to lead the owner to gold are stolen from a monetary in Greece MASK lays a trap for VENOM to get the antlers back

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Clash! The Old Red Enemy

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Blade and Darkon fight in a final battle to determine Earths future

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget has a double mission not only to retrieve a pearl necklace but also to stop the gang from making an alliance with Chow

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget and Penny are in Italy However Cheif Quimby gives Gadget an assignment It tells him that DrClaw is planning on stealing a priceless artifact known as the Golden Pizza However Gadget has to join an opera to find and stop the MAD agents from stealing the Golden Pizza Plus another agent is planning to use his singing plant to help DrClaw steal the Pizza Gadget must stop DrClaw from stealing the Golden Pizza and destroy the singing plant

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians launch an all-out effort to find and destroy Rogue-Star

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians try to help a planet whose elfin inhabitants have been conquered by the Renegades who have stolen the elves amazingly powerful Tramulet

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years
